creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
The port has been made broken because it doesn't fetch.
I've found four mirrors for the distfile, so please restore it.

I'm attaching the patch for Makefile, if it's needed I can send the other files as well.

Also, if there are no problem about that, I can take the maintainership for this port and for games/linux-enemyterritory-omni-bot and games/linux-enemyterritory-omni-bot-0660
